A '''battle''' at the [[Black Bantha Nebula/Legends|Black Bantha Nebula]] took place in [[27 ABY/Legends|27 ABY]] during the [[Yuuzhan Vong War]]. Following the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] capture of [[Reecee/Legends|Reecee]], [[Han Solo/Legends|Han]] and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] scouted the [[Black Bantha Nebula/Legends|Black Bantha]], a dangerous [[Nebula/Legends|nebula]] that was immune to [[Sensor/Legends|sensors]] and located on the [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperroute]] between Reecee and [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. There, they discovered that the [[Yuuzhan Vong]] Reecee fleet had moved there, and was being joined by hundreds of other Yuuzhan Vong ships from across [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]], in preparation for an attack on Coruscant. They sent word to [[Fleet Command (New Republic)/Legends|New Republic Fleet Command]], and [[Supreme Commander (Alliance)/Legends|Supreme Commander]] [[Sien Sovv]] hurriedly assembled a 900-ship fleet to attack. However, the Vong fleet outnumbered it by hundreds and was aided by superior coordination.

The crew of the [[Millennium Falcon/Legends|''Millennium Falcon'']] discovered that a large amount of the Vong fleet had not yet refuelled or restocked, and was in effect acting as a harmless decoy. This allowed Sovv to ignore that portion and concentrate on the main threats. Although one quarter of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]] fleet ended up being destroyed, in the end the Vong ships were destroyed or scattered. Additionally, a [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] force under [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] managed to capture the fleet's [[yammosk]] for the [[Yammosk Action]].

==Behind the scenes==
The battle at the Black Bantha Nebula first appeared in the novel ''[[The New Jedi Order: Star by Star]]''. ''[[The New Jedi Order Sourcebook]]'' mentions the battle in its ''Star by Star'' section, but erroneously states that it occurred at Reecee rather than the nebula.
